data.title:
$BTC Weekend time.

Since volatility and overall headlines were much lower last week and into the weekend, I think there's a good chance for us to just chop sideways again.

We've had some volatile weekends previously where gaps were created as price moved during the weekend.

1confirmation founder: Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for RWA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino posted on the X platform that the tokenization of real assets (RWA) is accelerating, covering treasury bonds, stocks, bonds, private credit, commodities, real estate and other fields. Among them, Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for the tokenization of real assets.

data.title: Pi Network Review: Mining Crypto with a Mobile Phone
data.description:
Pi Network has caught the attention of the entire crypto industry, offering an accessible and novel mechanism for mining cryptocurrencies using only a mobile phone. Since its launch, the project has been considered both disruptive and controversial, breaking the paradigms of a sector historically dominated by specialized equipment and high energy consumption. However, despite its ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/pi-network/

data.title: Tesla sees $8 billion retail inflow over 13-day buying frenzy amid plummeting prices
data.description:
Retail traders just poured $8.1 billion into Tesla stock over 13 straight trading days. That’s not some random hype—it’s the biggest retail buying streak by dollar amount in more than ten years, according to JPMorgan.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tesla-sees-8-billion-retail-funds-13-days/

data.title: Ethereum Whales Accumulate 120,000 ETH in Massive Purchase
data.description:
Whales purchase over 120,000 ETH worth $236 million, potentially impacting Ethereum prices.
source: https://coincu.com/327946-ethereum-whales-buy-120k-eth

data.title: MegaETH Ecosystem DEX Platform GTE Launches Test Network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the decentralized trading platform Global Token Exchange (GTE) on the MegaETH blockchain has launched a test network. Earlier news said that MegaETH has airdropped test network ETH to more than 190,000 wallets.

data.title: A new address withdrew 30 million BMT from Binance 2 hours ago, becoming the top holder on the chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, an address withdrew 30 million BMT (about 5.23 million US dollars) from Binance 2 hours ago, with a position price of 0.1743, becoming the address with the largest position on the chain. The address conducted a small withdrawal test when the BMT price was 0.2141 three days ago, or intended to wait for the price to pull back before building a large position.
